overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V depicting a character walking along a coastal highway during a vibrant sunset. The scene transitions from a roadside turnout to panoramic ocean views as the character walks north along the shoulder with vehicles passing by.

character turns right and begins walking along the road shoulder

agents.ego_description: walking from a paved turnout onto the dirt shoulder of the coastal highway

utility wires stretching along the highway

two-lane coastal road with moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a paved turnout beside a coastal highway during sunset, with mountains visible to the left. A small black car passes by on the road as the character turns right and begins walking along the shoulder, passing utility poles and sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with power lines and coastal cliffs

events.description: large truck with headlights on passes by on the highway
red truck and other vehicles pass by on the road

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck driving past with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: rocky cliff face rising beside the highway

segments.scene_description: Walking along the dirt shoulder of the coastal highway with power lines running parallel. Vehicles including a large truck pass by on the right while coastal cliffs become visible in the distance. The mountains remain prominent on the left as the sun sets.

events.description: white van drives past on the highway
character turns left to face the ocean and sunset

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal road with the ocean becoming visible to the left and mountains to the right

notable_agents.action: white van traveling along the highway

entered.detail: expansive view of the ocean becoming visible beyond the roadside vegetation
rocky promontory extending into the ocean

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the coastal highway with the ocean now visible to the left and cliffs rising on the right. Power lines run close by as vehicles including a white van pass on the road. The character turns toward the ocean as the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with panoramic sunset view

events.description: view shifts from highway focus to panoramic ocean and sunset vista

agents.ego_description: stopped walking to pan and observe the sunset over the ocean horizon

entered.detail: vast expanse of ocean meeting the colorful sunset sky
vibrant orange and pink sky with scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to face the ocean, revealing a panoramic view of the sunset over the water. The highway and power lines are no longer in view as the focus shifts entirely to the colorful sky, distant horizon, and silhouetted coastal hills.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal highway that transitions from a roadside walk into a panoramic sunset vista over the ocean. It begins at a paved turnout with mountains to the left, moving forward along the shoulder past utility poles as a small black car passes by. As the camera continues along the dirt path, the perspective shifts to include towering coastal cliffs in the distance and a large truck passing on the right. The scene then opens up to reveal the ocean appearing on the left while a white van drives past, before the camera gradually pivots away from the road and power lines. Finally, the view turns entirely toward the water, capturing a wide horizon of colorful sunset skies and silhouetted coastal hills.
